sayings.text: This page is in a superposition of existing and not existing. You just collapsed the wave function.
Not all who wander are lost — but this URL definitely is.
The server checked everywhere. Under the tables, behind the CDN, even cleared the cache. Nothing.
This page was like a semicolon in production: briefly there, then suddenly not.
We asked the database. It returned NULL. We're as surprised as you are.
Your destination exists in the git history. That's basically archaeology at this point.
This page went out for a quick refactor and never came back.
404: the digital equivalent of opening the fridge, forgetting what you wanted, and closing it again.
The page has gone the way of Internet Explorer — appreciated by some, gone by most.
Your URL had excellent ambition. The destination, however, declined to participate.
Life is a journey, not a destination. This URL interpreted that very literally.
Everything is fine. The page is fine. We're all fine. (The page is not fine.)
